overall.description: First-person exploration through a moonlit grassy meadow in a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2). The player walks through tall grass as clouds drift across the night sky, eventually revealing the moon over distant mountains and a wide valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: tall grass meadow with mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass observing the night landscape and distant mountains

entered.detail: dense tall grass swaying slightly in the foreground
large dark mountain silhouette against the night sky
cluster of dark bushes and shrubs lining the right side of the path
partly cloudy night sky with scattered clouds and visible stars

segments.scene_description: The segment shows first-person walking through a dense grassy field at night. Bushes line the right side while a large mountain range dominates the left horizon under a partly cloudy sky. The atmosphere is calm and exploratory.

events.description: camera begins panning left to reveal wider valley view between mountain ranges
full moon breaks through heavy cloud cover illuminating the landscape with bright silver light
game UI prompt appears indicating an interactive herb collectible nearby

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk while panning view left to observe the moonlit mountains and valley opening

entered.detail: bright full moon partially obscured by dramatic dark clouds creating rays of light
silhouetted mountain range visible across the wide valley opening
white text interface reading Pick and Examine with herb icon in bottom right corner

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left while walking, revealing a breathtaking view of the moon breaking through dense clouds over a wide valley. The lighting shifts dramatically as the moon becomes visible, casting silver light across the grassland. A game UI prompt appears indicating an interactive herb nearby.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark, grassy field that gradually opens into a moonlit vista of a wide valley. It begins with a steady walk through dense grass and bushes, with a large mountain range looming on the left horizon under a partly cloudy night sky. As the camera pans left, the dense cloud cover breaks to reveal a bright moon, causing the lighting to shift dramatically as silver light washes over the landscape. The scene then expands to showcase the breathtaking scale of the valley below before a game UI prompt appears to highlight an interactive herb in the grass.
